# PerformTrack

> PerformTrack is a Competency Based Curriculum (CBC) school performance management platform for Kenyan primary and junior schools. It handles marks entry, KPSEA/KJSEA reporting, attendance, fees, and parent communication.

PerformTrack is a multi-tenant SaaS used by school administrators, headteachers, teachers, and parents. The application is sign-in protected, so most surfaces are not publicly indexable.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Routes signed-in users to their dashboard, signed-out users to login.
- [Sign in](/login): Username + password login for school staff and parents.

## Optional

- [Forgot password](/forgot-password): Self-service password reset request.
